---
version: "v1.0.5"
category: "bug-fixes"
---

#### Stale generated files are removed when a `generate` block is removed or renamed

Files emitted by `generate` blocks (and the `remote_state.generate` attribute) are now tracked in
`.terragrunt-generate-manifest` inside the cache working directory. On every run, files recorded
by the previous manifest that are not produced by the current configuration are removed before
the new files are written.

This fixes a class of confusing failures where a `generate` block was removed from `root.hcl`
(or its `path` was renamed) but the previously generated `.tf` file lingered in the cache and was
picked up by the next `tofu init`/`plan`/`apply`.

Files left in place by `disable = true` with `if_disabled = "skip"` are still preserved across
runs, so opting out of generation without removing the block keeps the existing file untouched.
